title: Vera Bradley Earnings Calendar
text: Zacks Earnings Calendar provides historical earnings dates and forecasts for Vera Bradley. The company typically reports quarterly results approximately 5-7 weeks after quarter end. Historical performance shows mixed earnings surprises with the company beating on EPS in some quarters and missing in others. Analyst consensus estimates are updated quarterly based on company guidance and forward projections. The stock received a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating in recent evaluations, indicating shares are expected to perform in line with the market in the near future.
